name: task-01
prompt: Educational infographic that teaches one startup task. Title text at the top: "Write down the idea and the problem it solves". Central idea to communicate visually: Turn a vague hunch into a single, sharp problem statement on one page. Design it as a clean, self-explanatory diagram with 4 labelled icon nodes connected by numbered steps or arrows showing the flow. The icon nodes are labelled: "Draft a one", "Write", "Score the problem", "Name the exact". Add one small tag/badge with the goal metric: "Problem clarity". Small bottom-corner phase label: "Phase 1: Idea & Validation". Keep it minimal, balanced, uncluttered and instantly readable.

Central idea to communicate visually: Use Google, Meta/Facebook and other paid channels to acquire users profitably. Design it as a clean, self-explanatory diagram with 4 labelled icon nodes connected by numbered steps or arrows showing the flow. The icon nodes are labelled: "Set a target", "Set up accurate", "Start with search", "Send ads". Add one small tag/badge with the goal metric: "Scalable paid acquisition with LTV". Small bottom-corner phase label: "Phase 10: Growth to 10,000". Keep it minimal, balanced, uncluttered and instantly readable.
